'''Neil Kaplan''' is a voice actor who provided voices for three ''Star Wars'' video games.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Works==
===Gameography===
{| {{Prettytable}}
! Year !! Title !! Contribution(s)
|-
|[[2001]]||''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''||[[Ganne|Boss Ganne]], Goonga trooper, Grenade battle droid, Gungan trooper, Missile battle droid
|-
|[[2003]]||''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''||[[Darth Bandon]], [[Gorse Bendak]], [[Ajuur]], [[Holdan]], [[Jergan]], [[Sith Governor]], [[Xor]], [[Zax]], [[Motta]], Additional Voices
|-
|[[2011]]||''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''||[[Skadge]], various Characters
|}

{| {{Prettytable}}
! Year !! Title !! Contribution(s) !! Notes

|2021||"[[The Ninth Jedi]]"||Narrator||English only<ref name="The Ninth Jedi">{{Visions|The Ninth Jedi}}</ref>
|}
